action.reasoning: Observation: New best of 0.4907 avg_acc (val~0.50 post-consolidation; early tasks ~0.4, late ~0.6; progressive val gain from 0.07->0.42->0.50). Curves still near-useless (single point). Analysis: Balanced replay (400/task) + consolidation effective vs prior 0.019-0.46 but forgetting persists; tensor/checkpoint bugs fixed. KD on full 100-class head (always 100 dims) can regularize toward old model to reduce forgetting further. Model uses full-head ResNet18 from start. Decision: Update model.py for CIFAR-adapted conv1 (better small-image features), fully rewrite clean train.py adding KD (T=2, beta=0.5 on all batches post-task0), memory=500/task (~50/cls balanced via meta), epochs/task=6, consolidation=5 epochs@lr=3e-4, improved per-epoch+per-30step logging with val_acc. Keep predict.py. Train then submit_eval expecting ~0.52+.
